'''wodhabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ywroken|ywroken]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ywroken|ywroken]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wodhabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhabithi|wodhabithi]] || [[word:wodhabiji|wodhabiji]] || [[word:wodhabishi|wodhabishi]] || [[word:wodhabiki|wodhabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhabuthuthu|wodhabuthuthu]] || [[word:wodhabujuju|wodhabujuju]] || [[word:wodhabushushu|wodhabushushu]] || [[word:wodhabukuku|wodhabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhabuthu|wodhabuthu]] || [[word:wodhabuju|wodhabuju]] || [[word:wodhabushu|wodhabushu]] || [[word:wodhabuku|wodhabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhabufthuf|wodhabufthuf]] || [[word:wodhabufjuf|wodhabufjuf]] || [[word:wodhabufshuf|wodhabufshuf]] || [[word:wodhabufkuf|wodhabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhabethe|wodhabethe]] || [[word:wodhabeje|wodhabeje]] || [[word:wodhabeshe|wodhabeshe]] || [[word:wodhabeke|wodhabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhabothotho|wodhabothotho]] || [[word:wodhabojojo|wodhabojojo]] || [[word:wodhaboshosho|wodhaboshosho]] || [[word:wodhabokoko|wodhabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhabotho|wodhabotho]] || [[word:wodhabojo|wodhabojo]] || [[word:wodhabosho|wodhabosho]] || [[word:wodhaboko|wodhaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhabofthof|wodhabofthof]] || [[word:wodhabofjof|wodhabofjof]] || [[word:wodhabofshof|wodhabofshof]] || [[word:wodhabofkof|wodhabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhabïfthïf|wodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfjïf|wodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfshïf|wodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfkïf|wodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhabïfthïfthïf|wodhabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfjïfjïf|wodhabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfshïfshïf|wodhabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfkïfkïf|wodhabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhabïfthïf|wodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfjïf|wodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfshïf|wodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfkïf|wodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhabïfthïf|wodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfjïf|wodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfshïf|wodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:wodhabïfkïf|wodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodhabæthæ|wodhabæthæ]] || [[word:wodhabæjæ|wodhabæjæ]] || [[word:wodhabæshæ|wodhabæshæ]] || [[word:wodhabækæ|wodhabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodhabathatha|wodhabathatha]] || [[word:wodhabajaja|wodhabajaja]] || [[word:wodhabashasha|wodhabashasha]] || [[word:wodhabakaka|wodhabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodhabatha|wodhabatha]] || [[word:wodhabaja|wodhabaja]] || [[word:wodhabasha|wodhabasha]] || [[word:wodhabaka|wodhabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodhabafthaf|wodhabafthaf]] || [[word:wodhabafjaf|wodhabafjaf]] || [[word:wodhabafshaf|wodhabafshaf]] || [[word:wodhabafkaf|wodhabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wodhabasha|wodhabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodhabshësha|wodhabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodhabrosha|wodhabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodhabmusha|wodhabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodhabyasha|wodhabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodhabnkshësha|gowodhabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodhabnkrosha|gowodhabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodhabnkmusha|gowodhabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodhabnkyasha|gowodhabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wodhadhabasha|wodhadhabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodhadhabshësha|wodhadhabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodhadhabrosha|wodhadhabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodhadhabmusha|wodhadhabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodhadhabyasha|wodhadhabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodhadhabnkshësha|gowodhadhabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodhadhabnkrosha|gowodhadhabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodhadhabnkmusha|gowodhadhabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodhadhabnkyasha|gowodhadhabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wedhæbasha|wedhæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wedhæbshësha|wedhæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wedhæbrosha|wedhæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wedhæbmusha|wedhæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wedhæbyasha|wedhæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowedhæbnkshësha|gowedhæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowedhæbnkrosha|gowedhæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowedhæbnkmusha|gowedhæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowedhæbnkyasha|gowedhæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wodhfabasha|wodhfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodhfabshësha|wodhfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodhfabrosha|wodhfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodhfabmusha|wodhfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodhfabyasha|wodhfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodhfabnkshësha|gowodhfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodhfabnkrosha|gowodhfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodhfabnkmusha|gowodhfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodhfabnkyasha|gowodhfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
